headline: Wall Street Brunch: Nvidia Time
summary: Nvidia earnings test AI demand and priced-in investor expectations. Fed minutes will reveal dissent details. SpaceX IPO speculation rises as prediction markets remain skeptical.

headline: Marqeta, Toast, Dolby Laboratories, Intuit, and GoDaddy Shares Plummet, What You Need To Know
summary: A number of stocks fell in the afternoon session after the April PPI report sent Treasury yields to 10-month highs, with the 10-year yield rising to 4.49%.
